```{r clock-component-clinical-associations, results='asis'}
    select(ID, Timepoint, all_of(feature_delta_cols)) %>%
    mutate(
      ID = as.integer(ID),
      Timepoint = as.character(Timepoint)
    ) %>%
    filter(Timepoint %in% timepoints) %>%
    left_join(clinical_df, by = c("ID", "Timepoint"))

  bind_rows(lapply(timepoints, function(timepoint_value) {
    df_tp <- df_feature_assoc %>% filter(Timepoint == timepoint_value)

    bind_rows(lapply(feature_delta_cols, function(feature_col) {
      bind_rows(
        test_spearman_assoc(df_tp, feature_col, vars_metabolic, "Metabolic"),
        test_spearman_assoc(df_tp, feature_col, vars_stress, "Stress"),
        test_spearman_assoc(df_tp, feature_col, vars_hematology, "Hematology"),
        test_spearman_assoc(df_tp, feature_col, vars_subject, "Symptoms")
      ) %>%
        mutate(
          Timepoint = timepoint_value,
          feature_col = feature_col
        )
    }))
  })) %>%
    left_join(label_tbl, by = "feature_col") %>%
    mutate(
      feature_set = feature_set,
      feature_type = feature_type
    ) %>%
    relocate(feature_set, feature_type, feature, feature_col, Timepoint, panel, variable)
}

clock_component_assoc_results <- bind_rows(
  run_feature_clinical_assoc(
    main_res$data_wide,
    clock_cols,
    feature_set = "Main clocks",
    feature_type = "Clock"
  ),
  run_feature_clinical_assoc(
    res_pc_grimage$data_wide,
    pc_grimage_cols,
    feature_set = "PCGrimAge",
    feature_type = "Clock component"
  ),
  run_feature_clinical_assoc(
    res1$data_wide,
    grimage1_cols,
    feature_set = "GrimAge",
    feature_type = "Clock component",
    prefix_patterns = "GrimAge"
  ),
  run_feature_clinical_assoc(
    res2$data_wide,
    grimage2_cols,
    feature_set = "GrimAge v2",
    feature_type = "Clock component",
    prefix_patterns = "GrimAge2"
  ),
  run_feature_clinical_assoc(
    ress$data_wide,
    systemsage_cols,
    feature_set = "SystemsAge",
    feature_type = "Clock component"
  )
) %>%
  mutate(p_adj_all_tests = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH"))

render_table(
  clock_component_assoc_results %>%
    filter(p_adj_all_tests < 0.05) %>%
    mutate(
      across(c(rho, p_value, p_adj, p_adj_all_tests), ~ signif(.x, 3))
    ) %>%
    arrange(p_adj_all_tests, p_value),
  caption = "Clock and clock-component clinical associations passing global BH-adjusted p < 0.05"
)
```

## Clock and Component Change-Change Clinical Associations

```{r clock-component-clinical-change-associations, results='asis'}
clinical_assoc_vars <- unique(c(
  vars_metabolic,
  vars_stress,
  vars_hematology,
  vars_subject
))

make_clinical_delta_df <- function(clinical_df,
                                   vars,
                                   timepoints = c("D+10", "M+1"),
                                   baseline_label = "D-1") {
  vars_present <- vars[vars %in% colnames(clinical_df)]

  baseline_df <- clinical_df %>%
    mutate(
      ID = as.integer(ID),
      Timepoint = as.character(Timepoint)
    ) %>%
    filter(Timepoint == baseline_label) %>%
    select(ID, all_of(vars_present)) %>%
    rename_with(~ paste0(.x, "_baseline"), all_of(vars_present))

  delta_df <- clinical_df %>%
    mutate(
      ID = as.integer(ID),
      Timepoint = as.character(Timepoint)
    ) %>%
    filter(Timepoint %in% timepoints) %>%
    select(ID, Timepoint, all_of(vars_present)) %>%
    left_join(baseline_df, by = "ID")

  for (v in vars_present) {
    baseline_col <- paste0(v, "_baseline")
    delta_col <- paste0(v, "_delta_from_", str_replace_all(baseline_label, "[^A-Za-z0-9]+", ""))
    delta_df[[delta_col]] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(delta_df[[v]])) -
      suppressWarnings(as.numeric(delta_df[[baseline_col]]))
  }

  delta_df
}

clinical_delta_df <- make_clinical_delta_df(clinical_df, clinical_assoc_vars)

clinical_delta_var_map <- tibble(
  variable = clinical_assoc_vars
) %>%
  filter(variable %in% colnames(clinical_df)) %>%
  mutate(
    delta_variable = paste0(variable, "_delta_from_D1")
  )

test_spearman_delta_assoc <- function(df, x_col, vars, panel_name, min_n = 5) {
  delta_vars <- clinical_delta_var_map %>%
    filter(variable %in% vars, delta_variable %in% colnames(df))

  res <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(delta_vars)), function(i) {
    v <- delta_vars$variable[i]
    delta_v <- delta_vars$delta_variable[i]

    x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[[x_col]]))
    y <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[[delta_v]]))
    ok <- is.finite(x) & is.finite(y)

    if (sum(ok) < min_n) return(NULL)
    if (sd(x[ok]) == 0 || sd(y[ok]) == 0) return(NULL)

    ct <- tryCatch(
      cor.test(x[ok], y[ok], method = "spearman", exact = FALSE),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )

    if (is.null(ct)) return(NULL)

    data.frame(
      panel = panel_name,
      variable = v,
      delta_variable = delta_v,
      n = sum(ok),
      rho = unname(ct$estimate),
      p_value = ct$p.value
    )
  }) %>% bind_rows()

  if (is.null(res) || nrow(res) == 0) return(NULL)

  res %>% mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH"))
}

run_feature_clinical_delta_assoc <- function(data_wide,
                                             feature_cols,
                                             feature_set,
                                             feature_type,
                                             prefix_patterns = NULL,
                                             timepoints = c("D+10", "M+1")) {
  feature_delta_cols <- paste0(feature_cols, "_RAA_z_base_delta")
  feature_delta_cols <- feature_delta_cols[feature_delta_cols %in% colnames(data_wide)]

  if (length(feature_delta_cols) == 0) {
    return(tibble())
  }

  label_tbl <- tibble(
    feature_col = feature_delta_cols,
    feature = str_remove(feature_delta_cols, "_RAA_z_base_delta$")
  )

  if (!is.null(prefix_patterns)) {
    for (pattern in prefix_patterns) {
      label_tbl$feature <- str_remove(label_tbl$feature, paste0("^", pattern))
    }
  }

  df_feature_delta_assoc <- data_wide %>%
    select(ID, Timepoint, all_of(feature_delta_cols)) %>%
    mutate(
      ID = as.integer(ID),
      Timepoint = as.character(Timepoint)
    ) %>%
    filter(Timepoint %in% timepoints) %>%
    left_join(clinical_delta_df, by = c("ID", "Timepoint"))

  bind_rows(lapply(timepoints, function(timepoint_value) {
    df_tp <- df_feature_delta_assoc %>% filter(Timepoint == timepoint_value)

    bind_rows(lapply(feature_delta_cols, function(feature_col) {
      bind_rows(
        test_spearman_delta_assoc(df_tp, feature_col, vars_metabolic, "Metabolic"),
        test_spearman_delta_assoc(df_tp, feature_col, vars_stress, "Stress"),
        test_spearman_delta_assoc(df_tp, feature_col, vars_hematology, "Hematology"),
        test_spearman_delta_assoc(df_tp, feature_col, vars_subject, "Symptoms")
      ) %>%
        mutate(
          Timepoint = timepoint_value,
          feature_col = feature_col
        )
    }))
  })) %>%
    left_join(label_tbl, by = "feature_col") %>%
    mutate(
      feature_set = feature_set,
      feature_type = feature_type,
      clinical_change = paste0(Timepoint, " - D-1")
    ) %>%
    relocate(
      feature_set, feature_type, feature, feature_col,
      Timepoint, clinical_change, panel, variable, delta_variable
    )
}

clock_component_clinical_delta_assoc_results <- bind_rows(
  run_feature_clinical_delta_assoc(
    main_res$data_wide,
    clock_cols,
    feature_set = "Main clocks",
    feature_type = "Clock"
  ),
  run_feature_clinical_delta_assoc(
    res_pc_grimage$data_wide,
    pc_grimage_cols,
    feature_set = "PCGrimAge",
    feature_type = "Clock component"
  ),
  run_feature_clinical_delta_assoc(
    res1$data_wide,
    grimage1_cols,
    feature_set = "GrimAge",
    feature_type = "Clock component",
    prefix_patterns = "GrimAge"
  ),
  run_feature_clinical_delta_assoc(
    res2$data_wide,
    grimage2_cols,
    feature_set = "GrimAge v2",
    feature_type = "Clock component",
    prefix_patterns = "GrimAge2"
  ),
  run_feature_clinical_delta_assoc(
    ress$data_wide,
    systemsage_cols,
    feature_set = "SystemsAge",
    feature_type = "Clock component"
  )
) %>%
  mutate(p_adj_all_tests = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH"))

render_table(
  clock_component_clinical_delta_assoc_results %>%
    filter(p_adj_all_tests < 0.05) %>%
    mutate(
      across(c(rho, p_value, p_adj, p_adj_all_tests), ~ signif(.x, 3))
    ) %>%
    arrange(p_adj_all_tests, p_value),
  caption = "Clock and clock-component change-change clinical associations passing global BH-adjusted p < 0.05"
)
```

# Save Results

```{r save-all-results}
# Save all plots as RDS
plots <- list(
  p_loadings12 = p_loadings12,
  p_loadings13 = p_loadings13,
  p_spaghetti = main_res$p1,
  p_raincloud = main_res$p2,
  p_raincloud_no_cell_adjustment = main_res_no_cell$p2,
  p_adjusted_vs_unadjusted = p_adjusted_vs_unadjusted,
  main_effects = main_res$effects,
  main_effects_no_cell_adjustment = main_res_no_cell$effects,
  p_dam_D10 = p_dam1,
  p_adapt_D10 = p_adapt1,
  p_dam_M1 = p_dam2,
  p_adapt_M1 = p_adapt2,
  res_GrimAge = res1,
  res_GrimAge_no_cell_adjustment = res1_no_cell,
  res_GrimAge2 = res2,
  res_GrimAge2_no_cell_adjustment = res2_no_cell,
  res_PCGrimAge = res_pc_grimage,
  res_PCGrimAge_no_cell_adjustment = res_pc_grimage_no_cell,
  res_SystemsAge = ress,
  res_SystemsAge_no_cell_adjustment = ress_no_cell,
  grimage_component_time_effects = grimage_component_time_effects,
  grimage_component_blood_cell_effects = grimage_component_blood_cell_effects,
  p_adjusted_vs_unadjusted_PCGrimAge = p_adjusted_vs_unadjusted_pc_grimage,
  p_adjusted_vs_unadjusted_GrimAge = p_adjusted_vs_unadjusted_grimage1,
  p_adjusted_vs_unadjusted_GrimAge2 = p_adjusted_vs_unadjusted_grimage2,
  grimage_component_decomposition_effects = grimage_component_decomposition_effects,
  decomp_PCGrimAge = decomp_pc_grimage_outputs,
  decomp_GrimAge = decomp_grimage1_outputs,
  decomp_GrimAge2 = decomp_grimage2_outputs,
  systemsage_component_time_effects = systemsage_component_time_effects,
  systemsage_component_blood_cell_effects = systemsage_component_blood_cell_effects,
  p_adjusted_vs_unadjusted_SystemsAge = p_adjusted_vs_unadjusted_systemsage,
  systemsage_component_decomposition_effects = systemsage_component_decomposition_effects,
  decomp_SystemsAge = decomp_systemsage_outputs,
  assoc_results = assoc_results,
  clock_component_assoc_results = clock_component_assoc_results,
  clock_component_clinical_delta_assoc_results = clock_component_clinical_delta_assoc_results
)
saveRDS(plots, file = "figures/epiAge_plots.rds")

# Save association results
write.table(
  assoc_results,
  file = "figures/epiAge_PC_association_results.csv",
  sep = ",",
  row.names = FALSE,
  quote = FALSE
)

write_xlsx(
  assoc_results,
  "figures/epiAge_PC_association_results.xlsx",
  col_names = TRUE,
  format_headers = TRUE
)

write.table(
  clock_component_assoc_results,
  file = "figures/clock_component_clinical_association_results.csv",
  sep = ",",
  row.names = FALSE,
  quote = FALSE
)

write_xlsx(
  clock_component_assoc_results,
  "figures/clock_component_clinical_association_results.xlsx",
  col_names = TRUE,
  format_headers = TRUE
)

write.table(
  clock_component_clinical_delta_assoc_results,
  file = "figures/clock_component_clinical_delta_association_results.csv",
  sep = ",",
  row.names = FALSE,
  quote = FALSE
)

write_xlsx(
  clock_component_clinical_delta_assoc_results,
  "figures/clock_component_clinical_delta_association_results.xlsx",
  col_names = TRUE,
  format_headers = TRUE
)
```
